overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's bustling downtown streets during the blue hour. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, heavy pedestrian traffic, futuristic vehicles, and a vibrant cyberpunk atmosphere with purple and cyan accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with purple neon structural lighting

events.description: main character stops walking and turns around to face the camera briefly

agents.ego_description: following the main character through a covered pedestrian corridor with neon purple lighting

notable_agents.action: main character wearing green shorts and blue top with tattooed legs walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: large purple support pillars with cyan neon accent lighting lining the walkway
wet polished concrete sidewalk reflecting purple and cyan neon lights
elevated walkway structure spanning across the street ahead with glass enclosure
tall building facade with large glowing holographic advertisements and neon displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by vibrant purple neon structural pillars. The camera follows a character in distinctive green shorts through a moderate crowd, with the wet pavement reflecting the cyberpunk lighting. The character briefly stops and turns around at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city sidewalk adjacent to multi-lane street with palm trees

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street environment with visible sky and traffic
character transitions from walking to jogging pace along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along open sidewalk next to busy street with futuristic traffic and palm trees

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal railing separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the vehicle street
tall palm trees lining the street against the dusk sky
large red overhead traffic signal structure spanning the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open sidewalk with full sky visibility and mixed natural-artificial lighting. The camera follows the character past a metal guard rail with moderate traffic flowing on the right. Palm trees and a red traffic gantry become visible in the distance as the character increases pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: character approaches crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection
camera tilts upward to focus on the tall cylindrical building with holographic ads

agents.ego_description: navigating toward and through the street crosswalk, moving between vehicles

notable_agents.action: red vintage-style futuristic car waiting at the intersection crosswalk
white armored vehicle driving through the intersection

entered.detail: bold yellow zebra crossing markings on the dark asphalt street
massive red structural gantry supporting traffic signals and signage
tall circular skyscraper wrapped in rotating holographic advertisements and neon displays

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a wide-open street intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. The camera captures moderate futuristic traffic including a distinctive red car and white armored vehicle. Toward the end, the camera dramatically tilts upward to showcase a towering cylindrical building covered in holographic advertisements against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with street vendors and neon commercial signage

events.description: camera tilts back down from building to sidewalk level to continue following character
passing a lit food vendor stall on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past pedestrians and a street food vendor

entered.detail: small illuminated food cart with yellow and purple coloring and glowing interior
elevated train track or transit structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to sidewalk level and continues following the character past a brightly lit food vendor stall. The scene features moderate pedestrian density and ongoing street traffic, with an elevated metro overpass visible in the distance. The segment maintains the cyberpunk atmosphere with neon commercial signage lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon walkway into the expansive, open-air bustle of a futuristic city intersection. It begins within a covered pedestrian passage illuminated by purple structural pillars, following a character in green shorts across wet, reflective pavement. As the character exits the shelter, the scene opens onto a wide sidewalk where the lighting shifts to a mix of natural dusk and artificial glow, passing palm trees and a red traffic gantry. The camera then glides into a broad street intersection filled with futuristic vehicles and yellow crosswalks before tilting dramatically upward to reveal a towering cylindrical building draped in holographic advertisements. Finally, the view returns to street level to follow the character past a brightly lit food vendor and neon commercial signage, with an elevated metro overpass looming in the distance.
